creator: brooks@FreeBSD.org
text: The port was broken over the weekend because I failed to add a patch before committing. I can't tell from the log if you have the patch or not, but if you update so you have https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/devel/llvm-devel/files?id=601ecab5f916efe7043347207139812b933d7ccc things should build.
